PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Leeds Disston, petitioner.

The Court asked if there was anything left to do to try and track down the putative will. He said there was not. He had spoken with Mr. Stokes, attorney for the decedent, who had informed him there was no executed will proveded to him. He had nothing further to add. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
